446 ROUTE_PRVDR_VRBL_CD ROUTE_PRVDR_VRBL_CD Provider Trans - Verbal CHAR 1 This column documents whether the transmission route of patient's current reconciled medication list to subsequent provider was verbal. 0 = No
1 = Yes
^ = Blank
